rules.recommended_validator_command: PowerShell parser check for changed .ps1 files, then git diff --check
rules.reason: PowerShell scripts must parse before staging.

rules.recommended_validator_command: JSON parse check for changed .json files, then git diff --check
rules.reason: JSON artifacts must parse before staging.
Ignore rules must match runtime artifacts without hiding source files.
Commit package tooling should preview exact staging recommendations only.
